prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LS7 (7.0L, 427ci, RPO LS7)** with forged internals including **Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.125" stroke)**, **Manley I-beam connecting rods**, and **JE Pistons (11.5:1 compression, forged aluminum)**. Pair with a **Holley Dominator EFI system (2,200+ HP capable)** and **FAST XFI Sportsman ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA (62mm, ball-bearing) turbocharger** with a **custom 4" stainless steel exhaust manifold (TIG-welded, equal-length headers)** and **Turbonetics Deltagate 50 wastegate**. Intercooling handled by a **PWR 4.5-core front-mount intercooler (1,200 HP rated)** with **DeatschWerks 450 LPH fuel pumps** and **ID1000x injectors** for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with **Detroit Speed QUADRALINK 4-link rear suspension (coil-over conversion, adjustable ride height)** and **RideTech HQ Series double-adjustable shocks (rebound/compression tuning)**. Front end reinforced with **Global West tubular control arms (polyurethane bushings)** and **Hotchkis Sport sway bars (1.25" front, 1" rear)** for neutral handling. Braking upgraded to **Baer 6P 6-piston calipers (14" two-piece rotors, slotted/drilled)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders, custom rear diffuser)** with **custom carbon fiber side skirts (hand-laid, 3K twill weave)** and **Vortex Generators (carbon fiber, roof-mounted)** for aerodynamic stability at high speeds. Paint scheme: **PPG Custom Candy Apple Red (3-stage, high-gloss)** with **blacked-out SS badges (vinyl wrap, matte finish)** and **LED halo headlights (Lux H8, 6000K color temperature)** for modern aggression.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (alcantara/leather, FIA-approved)** and **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM, cam-lock)**. Dashboard replaced with **AIM MXS Strada digital dash (12.3" display, CAN bus integration)** and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip)**. Roll cage fabricated from **Chromoly 4130 tubing (TIG-welded, 8-point, NHRA-certified)** with **sound deadening via Dynamat Xtreme (full cabin coverage)**.

Wheel setup: **Forgeline GA3R 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) wheels (concave design, 3-piece construction)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**. Center-lock conversion via **BBS Motorsport hubs (spline drive, titanium hardware)**. Exterior accents include **custom billet aluminum side mirrors (ANZO USA, racing-style)** and **LED taillights (Diode Dynamics, sequential turn signals)** with **smoked lenses (3M Scotchprint film)** for a stealthy look.
